COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable using the DE file. We consider the beneficiary to have Managed Care 
Medical coverage during the month If the beneficiary had Medicaid or CHIP enrollment for the month, 
and the monthly managed care plan type code was for a comprehensive managed care plan or a 
health insuring organization (i.e., where MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_MM is ('01' '04'). 

We set this variable to null/missing for beneficiaries who are not enrolled in Medicaid during
